name: Pact Magic
scalingSummary: 1 slot at L1, 2 at L2, 3 at L11, 4 at L17; slot level: 1st at L1, 2nd at L3, 3rd at L5, 4th at L7, 5th at L9
mechanicalSummary: Cast warlock spells using pact magic slots that recharge on a short rest. All slots are the same (maximum) level. Known caster: 2 spells at L1, scaling to 15.

evidence.pointer: Warlock casterType=pact, pactSlotsUsed tracking in HeroSheet

notes: Pact slots all cast at the same maximum level. Short-rest recharge distinguishes warlock from all other casters.

name: Eldritch Invocations
scalingSummary: 2 invocations at L2, 3 at L5, 4 at L7, 5 at L9, 6 at L12, 7 at L15, 8 at L18
mechanicalSummary: Choose eldritch invocations that grant passive benefits, at-will spells, or modifications to eldritch blast. Some invocations grant specific actions (e.g., Bewitching Whispers: cast compulsion) or modifications.

evidence.pointer: Warlock L2: Eldritch Invocations; level-specific More invocations; featureDescriptions

notes: BUG-9: Missing 'More invocations' at L12 in ruleset.ts. Corrected in current data.
Many invocations grant actions (spells) or modify eldritch blast — each would need its own row for a full audit.

name: Pact Boon
mechanicalSummary: Choose a pact boon: Pact of the Chain (find familiar with special forms, bonus action to command to attack), Pact of the Blade (summon pact weapon as action, proficiency, can be bonded magic weapon), Pact of the Tome (Book of Shadows with 3 cantrips from any list), Pact of the Talisman (wearer adds d4 to failed ability checks, PB uses/LR).
notes: Each boon offers distinct mechanical options that could be separate capability rows.

name: Mystic Arcanum
scalingSummary: 6th-level arcanum at L11, 7th at L13, 8th at L15, 9th at L17
mechanicalSummary: Learn and cast one high-level warlock spell once per long rest without expending a spell slot. Each arcanum is a separate spell known and use.

evidence.pointer: Warlock L11: Mystic Arcanum; L13/L15/L17: improvements; featureDescriptions

notes: 1/LR per arcanum level — not pact slots.

name: Eldritch Master
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended pact magic slots. Once per long rest.

name: Dark One's Blessing (The Fiend)
trigger: When reducing a hostile creature to 0 HP
scalingSummary: Temp HP = Charisma modifier + warlock level
mechanicalSummary: Gain temporary HP equal to Charisma modifier + warlock level when you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP.

name: Dark One's Own Luck (The Fiend)
trigger: When making an ability check or saving throw
mechanicalSummary: Add 1d10 to an ability check or saving throw. Decide after seeing the d20 but before DM declares result.

evidence.pointer: the-fiend L6: Dark One's Own Luck

name: Hurl Through Hell (The Fiend)
trigger: Once per long rest, when hitting a creature with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Target vanishes on a quick trip through the lower planes. It returns at end of your next turn having taken 10d10 psychic damage if not a fiend.

name: Hexblade's Curse (The Hexblade)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, curse a creature within 30 ft for 1 minute. You crit on 19-20 against it, add proficiency to damage, and regain warlock level + Cha HP if it dies.

name: Accursed Specter (The Hexblade)
trigger: When slaying a humanoid (once per long rest)
mechanicalSummary: When you slay a humanoid, raise its spirit as a specter under your control that lasts until end of next long rest.

name: Armor of Hexes (The Hexblade)
trigger: When your Hexblade's Curse target hits you with an attack
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to roll a d6. On 4+, the attack misses regardless of the attack roll.

name: Healing Light (The Celestial)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, spend any number of d6s from your pool to heal a creature within 60 ft.

name: Searing Vengeance (The Celestial)
trigger: When reduced to 0 HP or making a death save at the start of your turn
mechanicalSummary: Regain half your max HP, stand up, and deal 2d8 + Cha radiant damage to enemies of choice within 30 ft (blind them on failed Con save).

name: Tentacle of the Deeps (The Fathomless)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, summon a 10-ft tentacle within 60 ft for 1 minute. Make a melee spell attack as a bonus action: 1d8 cold damage, reduce target speed by 10 ft until start of your next turn.

evidence.pointer: the-fathomless L1: Tentacle of the Deeps

name: Genie's Wrath (The Genie)
trigger: Once per turn, when hitting with an attack roll
scalingSummary: +PB damage of element type (bludgeoning for Dao, cold for Marid, fire for Efreeti, thunder for Djinni)
mechanicalSummary: Add proficiency bonus damage of your genie's element type to one attack per turn.

name: Limited Wish (The Genie)
mechanicalSummary: As an action, replicate any 6th-level-or-lower spell that takes 1 action to cast. No material components up to 1000 gp. Recharges after 1d4 long rests.

name: Form of Dread (The Undead)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, transform for 1 minute. Gain 1d10+warlock level temp HP. Once per turn when hitting with an attack, can force target to make Wis save or be frightened. Immune to frightened at L10.
